name: Apaman Co., Ltd.
summary: Apaman Co., Ltd. operates a real estate portal in Japan. It provides Apamanshop, a real estate portal that provides domestic and overseas rental and monthly property information, and trading and investment property information. The company was formerly known as Apamanshop Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Apaman Co., Ltd. in January 2018. Apaman Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
